clauses.1: Both parties agree to maintain confidentiality of shared information.
clauses.5: Agreement term: 3 years from effective date.
clauses.8.3: Vendor may use Client data for product improvement.

policies.name: Data Sharing Policy
policies.description: Client data must not be shared, accessed, or used by vendors for any purpose beyond fulfilling the contracted service. Vendors may not use client data for product improvement, AI training, analytics, or any secondary purpose.
